# CircleDollarSign

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::CircleDollarSign;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        CircleDollarSign { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
monetization, marketing, currency, money, payment

## Categories
finance

[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/circle-dollar-sign)
